nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for large or complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I cannot trust it to implement large features all at once

nodes.label: AI adherence to instructions
nodes.grounding_span: instead of doing that it wanted to create another large function to make the correction

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: It has increased my output significantly

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: If AI is better at its job that means that I am better at my job

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: speed is really important to me

nodes.label: Mastery and competence
nodes.grounding_span: I am making sure that I know how to use it

nodes.label: Resistance to over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: it taking certain liberties when I don't ask for it really frustrate me

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as a permanent feature of the future

nodes.label: Granular decomposition and iterative testing
nodes.grounding_span: I am very granular and specific with it now, but I will sporadically test

nodes.label: Explicit rule-setting and corrective feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I tell it to do something with VERY specific rules, it executes, I review it and if it made a mistake I will take the time to clearly explain how it messed up
